exercises.title: Spot the Motion
exercises.content: Look around right now. List 3 things that are in motion and 3 things that are stationary. Remember: motion is relative!
hints: Even 'still' things might be moving relative to something else

exercises.title: Is It Moving?
exercises.content: A person on an airplane. Relative to the airplane: moving or still? Relative to the ground: moving or still?
hints: It depends on what you compare it to
